codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failed feature and the follow-up fix commit in context. Native retrieval now requires a body-level `%PDF-` signature before reporting success, the regression test covers mislabeled `application/pdf` HTML bodies, and the save-path flow still avoids stray files by only writing after PDF validation succeeds.

summary: Re-reviewed the previously failed native retrieval feature against the current implementation and fix commit `a094db38eb6586b0ec4fb0ea30944566422a79d8`. Result: pass. The original blocking PDF-detection bug is resolved, mislabeled non-PDF responses now return `not_found` without leaving files behind, and I did not find any remaining blocking issues in this feature area.
